content:
## File Structure

### New Files

```
tools/corvia-dashboard/
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ package.json
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ vite.config.ts
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ tsconfig.json
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ index.html
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ src/
‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ main.tsx                    # Entry point, router setup
‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ types.ts                    # TypeScript types (mirrors Rust dashboard types)
‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ api.ts                      # Typed fetch wrapper for /api/dashboard/*
‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ hooks/
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ use-poll.ts             # Generic polling hook (3s default)
‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ styles/
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ theme.css               # Design tokens (colors, typography, shadows)
‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ components/
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ Layout.tsx              # Shell: header + metrics + main area
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ Header.tsx              # Brand, status pills, scope badge
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ MetricsGrid.tsx         # 4 metric cards with trends
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ LogsView.tsx            # Log terminal with level filters and search
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ TracesView.tsx          # Module topology graph + detail panel
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ GraphView.tsx           # Knowledge graph (placeholder, extend later)
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ ConfigPanel.tsx         # Config sidebar (read-only)
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ OfflineState.tsx        # Error/offline fallback
‚îÇ   ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ test/
‚îÇ       ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ dashboard.spec.ts       # Playwright test suite
```


### Modified Files

| File | Change |
|------|--------|
| `.devcontainer/extensions/corvia-services/extension.js` | Retrofit: replace HTML blob with webview pointing at dashboard URL |

---
